reasoning: VIX at 22.47 (HIGH regime) rising 6.09% from prior session signals accelerating fear and volatility. No macro events scheduled today removes event-driven volatility risk, but the residual VIX elevation favors bearish setups. Contradictory signal: sector rotation is risk-on (Tech +0.95%, Financials +0.33%), suggesting tactical bid despite elevated IV. Overnight gap flat (+$0.43) adds no directional bias. Macro backdrop is neutral-to-mixed — VIX dominates but sector strength creates uncertainty on pure bearish conviction.
